raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Landing check-in","name":"What’s been most on your mind at work lately, Aisha?","description":"Safe opener that lets her set the agenda before any friction is named.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"settling","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Meeting uncertainty","name":"Which cross-functional meetings still feel hardest to step into?","description":"Surfaces the specific contexts where she is still feeling unsure rather than assuming it is general.","purpose":"topic","stage":"orientation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Decision rights map","name":"Where do the decision rights still feel fuzzy for you?","description":"Identifies where she is spending energy decoding who decides versus who advises.","purpose":"topic","stage":"orientation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Consensus pressure","name":"When priorities conflict, what makes it hardest to move the conversation forward?","description":"Surfaces the communication pattern that slows alignment in the moment.","purpose":"competency","stage":"orientation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Alignment friction","name":"What part of the alignment work is taking more effort than it should?","description":"Finds the practical friction in running alignment without making it abstract.","purpose":"topic","stage":"blockers","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Unspoken norms","name":"What are you still having to infer instead of just knowing?","description":"Surfaces hidden norms and expectations that are consuming attention.","purpose":"topic","stage":"blockers","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Escalation boundary","name":"What feels like a decision you should own versus escalate?","description":"Clarifies the boundary between local ownership and manager involvement.","purpose":"topic","stage":"blockers","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Support needed","name":"What would make the next couple of weeks steadier for you?","description":"Turns the conversation toward practical support and removes avoidable friction.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"connection","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Partner map","name":"Who do you want to get more solid with next?","description":"Identifies the key relationships that would improve her cross-functional effectiveness.","purpose":"topic","stage":"connection","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Manager boundaries","name":"What boundaries from me would help most right now?","description":"Elicits the concrete support and guardrails she needs from her manager.","purpose":"topic","stage":"connection","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]}]}
